Project rebuilt as a production-level Smart Parking Web Application using Python and Flask. No blueprints, no routing errors, no unnecessary complexity. Features: secure login, flash messages, revenue analytics chart, responsive Bootstrap design, clean dashboard cards, professional UI. Ready for graduation defense.
